prose:
**Pyridine frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz`, single-point orbital analysis (no geometry optimization). SCF converged in 10 cycles; no warnings reported. HOMO = −7.2525992 eV, LUMO = −1.1127860 eV → gap = 6.1398131 eV.
Reproducibility:
• Command:
  `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp94vm38cg/live.json`
• Output JSON: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp94vm38cg/live.json`
